key: Good evening, passengers. This is the final boarding call for flight A L two zero two five to Sydney, now boarding at gate B twelve. Please have your boarding pass and passport ready. We are sorry for the short delay. Would all remaining passengers please proceed to the gate. Thank you for flying with Alumni Airlines.
